mapper.select:
SELECT s.*,dr.dorm_number,d.building FROM students s JOIN dorm_rooms dr ON s.room_id = dr.id LEFT JOIN dorms d ON s.dorm_id = d.id
AND student_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.studentId}, '%')
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.name}, '%')
AND s.gender = #{param.gender}
AND `group` = #{param.group}
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.phone}, '%')
AND major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.major}, '%')
AND enrollment_year = #{param.enrollmentYear}
AND d.building LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.building}, '%')
AND dr.dorm_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.dormNumber}, '%')
ORDER BY id
